gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Delete" icon on the far right of the newly created milestone
Then the user should see a popup window titled "Delete Milestone"
When the user clicks on the "Delete" button within the "Delete Milestone" dialog
Then the popup window should disappear
When the user refreshes the webpage
Then the user should see the milestone was deleted from the table
And the milestone should no longer appear in the list

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "Delete" icon on the far right of the newly created milestone
